# LendPeak

> LendPeak provides fast, flexible small-business funding — primarily **Merchant Cash Advances** (working capital advanced against a business's future sales) — from **$10,000 to $1,000,000**, funded in **as little as 24 hours**, with **no collateral** and **550+ credit considered**. Decisions are based on business revenue, not just credit score, and a soft credit pull is used to pre-qualify (no impact to credit). Available in **all 50 U.S. states**. **$850M+ funded**, **8+ years** in business, **4.9★ on Trustpilot**.

## Key facts
- Product: Merchant Cash Advance / Working Capital (B2B — a purchase of future receivables, **not** a consumer loan)
- Funding amount: $10,000–$1,000,000; funded in as fast as 24 hours after signing
- Eligibility: 6+ months in business, $10,000+ monthly revenue, 550+ credit score, active business bank account
- Repayment: a small, agreed percentage of daily or weekly sales (revenue-based, flexes with the business)
- Cost: a flat factor rate (not compounding interest); all costs disclosed before signing
- Coverage: all 50 U.S. states
- Phone: (888) 744-8119
- Also offered: term loans, business line of credit, equipment financing, invoice financing, SBA loans

## Pages
- [Working Capital / MCA](https://lendpeak.com/funding/working-capital/): the flagship product — fast working capital, no collateral, bad credit considered
- [Term Loans](https://lendpeak.com/funding/term-loans/): lump sum repaid on a fixed 6–36 month schedule
- [Business Line of Credit](https://lendpeak.com/funding/line-of-credit/): revolving credit — draw, repay, redraw
- [Equipment Financing](https://lendpeak.com/funding/equipment-financing/): finance vehicles, machinery and tools
- [Invoice Financing](https://lendpeak.com/funding/invoice-financing/): turn unpaid B2B invoices into cash
- [SBA Loans](https://lendpeak.com/funding/sba-loans/): government-backed, lowest rates, longest terms
- [Who We Fund — 50+ industries](https://lendpeak.com/funding/industries/): restaurants, construction, retail, medical, transportation, and more

## Disclosures
A merchant cash advance is a purchase of future business receivables, not a loan. Funding amounts, factor rates, terms, and fees vary by business profile and are disclosed in a written agreement before signing. Some products are not available in all states. LendPeak does not provide legal, tax, or financial advice.
